name: EdwComsnRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte_min_run_cyc AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SubjCd}' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC AS T INNER JOIN cte_min_run_cyc AS S ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = S.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = S.SUBJ_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = S.TRGT_SYS_CD WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO >= S.RUN_CYC_NO AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:
JOB NAME:     EdwComsnRunCycUpd

DESCRIPTION:  Update the P_RUN_CYC table EDW load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the EDW.
      

INPUTS:
The following IDS table is used:
P_RUN_CYC


  
HASH FILES:


TRANSFORMS:  
                 
                           
PROCESSING:  Extracts the P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Commission with the EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'.  These rows are used to update the P_RUN_CYCLE, load indicator field for the particular source and subject.  All run cycles where the indicator is "N" are updated to "Y".



OUTPUTS: 
                    IDS P_RUN_CYC

MODIFICATIONS:

Annotations:
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Commission with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
EDW Commission Load Indicator Update
